skills.name: backtest-strategy-lab
skills.summary: Backtest a curated catalog of trend, breakout, mean-reversion, volatility-expansion, and opening-range Pine strategies using TradeCLI's TradingView tools.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: backtest-fast-sweep
skills.summary: Run deterministic TradingView-only Pine sweeps across parameter, symbol, and timeframe grids in one code-level tool call, persist AITradingOffice record/run lineage, then shortlist finalists for backtest-strategy-lab.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: investment-committee
skills.summary: Evaluate one Indian-listed equity through independent market, fundamentals, news, sentiment-proxy, bull/bear, trader, and risk-committee stages.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: screener-conviction-workflow
skills.summary: Run named Indian-equity screener views such as high momentum, breakout, RVOL, pullback, bounce, bearish breakdown, and sector rotation, then adapt candidates to CNC, MIS, MTF, futures, options, or index trade kinds.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: hedge-fund-ceo-daily-office
skills.summary: Run the daily Hedge Fund CEO office loop: read fund capital and risk, wake/delegate desks, allocate paper budgets, collect reports, and record the daily plan.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: hedge-fund-short-mis-desk
skills.summary: Trade the paper Short MIS desk for intraday bearish equity setups, with same-day exits and AITradingOffice fund-book journaling.

skills.name: hedge-fund-long-mis-desk
skills.summary: Trade the paper Long MIS desk for intraday bullish equity setups, with same-day exits and AITradingOffice fund-book journaling.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: hedge-fund-long-mtf-desk
skills.summary: Run the paper Long MTF desk for multi-day long equity trades using fund capital, technical/fundamental checks, stops, and thesis records.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: hedge-fund-investor-desk
skills.summary: Maintain long-horizon hedge-fund research, watchlists, position reviews, and investment thesis records without placing trades.

skills.name: hedge-fund-option-index-desk
skills.summary: Trade paper index options for NIFTY/BANKNIFTY-style setups with greeks, OI, volatility, premium exposure checks, and AITradingOffice records.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: hedge-fund-option-stock-desk
skills.summary: Trade paper single-stock options on Indian F&O names with event-aware contract selection, greeks, liquidity checks, and option records.

skills.name: hedge-fund-commodity-desk

skills.name: hedge-fund-stock-futures-desk

skills.name: hedge-fund-skill-improvement-review
